results.title: 7 Agentforce Alternatives for AI Sales & GTM Automation ...
results.content:
### 11x Compared With Agentforce

Agentforce is designed as a broad Salesforce agent platform for many teams and workflows. 11x is narrower and more specialized: it focuses on autonomous GTM execution and pipeline generation. That makes 11x a stronger fit for revenue teams prioritizing outbound pipeline creation, inbound qualification, closed-lost re-engagement, lead reactivation, event follow-up, and meeting booking.

## 2. Oliv.ai

Oliv.ai provides AI agents for revenue teams, including agents for prospecting, meeting assistance, CRM management, forecasting, coaching, pipeline tracking, and content curation. Its product messaging focuses on sales, customer success, and revenue operations teams.

### Core Capabilities

Turn demand into pipeline with AI digital workers.

Consolidate 20+ tools into one unified GTM engine.

# 7 Agentforce Alternatives for AI Sales and GTM Automation in 2026

Salesforce Agentforce has become one of the most visible enterprise AI agent platforms, with Salesforce positioning it as a way to build, deploy, test, and supervise AI agents across business workflows. [...] ### Core Capabilities

### Use Case Fit

Oliv.ai is relevant for teams that want AI assistance around the existing sales team’s daily workflow, including prospecting preparation, meeting follow-up, CRM updates, forecasting, and pipeline management. It is generally evaluated by revenue teams that want agent support across day-to-day sales operations.

## 3. Clay

Clay is a GTM data and enrichment platform that brings data providers, enrichment, intent data, and AI agents into flexible workflows. Clay describes itself as a platform for teams that want to combine unique data with the ability to act on that data.

results.title: AI Agents for Salesforce: 118 Reviewed With Ratings
results.content:
For sales follow-ups and pipeline management, Outreach and Salesloft are the deepest Salesforce integrations for sales execution. For revenue intelligence and CRM data quality, Gong and Clari both write directly to Salesforce opportunity records. For autonomous outbound prospecting that syncs to Salesforce, Apollo and Artisan Ava are widely used.

### Which AI agents work with both Salesforce and HubSpot?

Several agents integrate with both Salesforce and HubSpot, making them suitable for teams using both CRMs or transitioning between them. Apollo, Instantly, Outreach, Gong, and Attention all support both platforms natively. For teams that also need data warehouse integration alongside CRM, Clay and Composio offer the broadest multi-system connectivity. [...] Atlassian Rovo logo

Atlassian Rovo is an AI assistant that works across Confluence, Jira, and other Atlassian products, offering AI search, chat, and autonomous agents powered by the Teamwork Graph. Included from $5.42/mo per user.

Crayon logo

Crayon is an enterprise AI competitive intelligence platform that automates competitor tracking across 100+ data types and delivers battlecards and sales plays to revenue teams.

Klue logo

Klue is an AI-powered competitive intelligence and win-loss analysis platform that automates intel collection and delivers battlecards and deal insights to enterprise sales teams.

Coda AI logo [...] The most capable Salesforce AI agents update opportunity stages based on conversation outcomes, enrich contact and account records from external data sources, generate call summaries and sync them to activity history, score leads against custom criteria and route them to the correct rep, flag at-risk deals based on engagement signals, and generate forecast reports from live pipeline data. These are not reporting tools that read Salesforce: they are agents that actively maintain and improve your CRM data quality.

results.title: 11 best AI sales pipeline tools to scale revenue in 2025 | Outreach
results.content:
The platform works best for enterprises already invested in the Salesforce ecosystem that require native AI without additional platforms.

What makes it different: Einstein's deep integration with Salesforce's CRM platform means no data silos, plus access to Agentforce autonomous agents for complex workflows.

## 3. Pipedrive

Pipedrive excels at helping small to mid-sized sales teams stay organized and focused with visual, AI-assisted pipeline management. Its intuitive drag-and-drop interface, deal prioritization, and predictive insights are ideal for teams without dedicated RevOps resources who need a clear view of their sales process. [...] ## 7. Qualified

Qualified's Piper AI SDR Agent converts inbound website visitors into pipeline by engaging prospects in real-time conversations across web chat, email, voice, and video. Unlike basic chatbots that follow rigid scripts, Piper dynamically thinks, reasons, and strategizes to qualify leads and book meetings most effectively.

Piper works 24/7 to greet high-intent visitors, answer product questions, qualify buying committees, and route opportunities to the right sales reps instantly. The platform integrates deeply with Salesforce, Marketo, HubSpot, and other GTM tools to synthesize first-party CRM data, marketing automation signals, and real-time website behavior.
